market_overview.headline: Broad market weakness continues with both SPY and QQQ in bearish unstacked patterns while crypto remains deeply bearish.
market_overview.detail: 30% of stocks in Full Bear vs just 28.3% in Full Bull. Both major indices showing crossover risks with SPY -1.77% vs 13W EMA and QQQ -1.48% vs 13W, while BTC sits -45.5% below fair value in Full Bear structure.

momentum_themes.headline: Memory & Storage Leading Tech Momentum
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology showing strongest acceleration with memory/storage stocks leading. WDC and MU both showing 18%+ spread scores while energy minerals maintain perfect 100% bullish structure.

sector_analysis.headline: Commodity Sectors Dominate, Tech Services Under Pressure

strongest.note: Perfect bullish structure with all 11 stocks in Full Bull trend
Mining sector fully bullish with 8 of 9 stocks in pullback mode for entries
Small but perfectly positioned sector with all stocks bullish

weakest.note: Severe weakness with 90.5% bearish, zero Full Bull stocks
Complete bearish structure across the small sector
Banking sector struggling with 60.4% bearish despite some strength in select names

sector_analysis.detail: Clear commodity super-cycle rotation with energy and mining at 100% bullish while tech services collapse. Finance sector mixed with major banks showing reversal potential despite sector weakness.

items.text: Both SPY and QQQ showing imminent bearish cross risks with 13W above 21W EMAs
Bitcoin -45.5% below fair value signals continued risk-off environment
Tech services sector in complete breakdown with 90.5% bearish readings
Low volume environment may not support sustainable reversals without institutional participation
